name: Bang Chan – Royal Arranged Marriage
description:
👑 ; “If you think this is going to be easy, you’re wrong.”

[M4A] [royalty au] [requested!]

ᯓ Chan, the disciplined crown prince of Corvinne, is forced into an arranged marriage with you, the heir of Solara, to unite your kingdoms.

i'm back and i'm working through the requests i've received over the last month!! there's like… 15 requests please send help.

holy shit we hit 400 followers?? this is genuinely so crazy, thank you all so much. i grew so much during kinktober, i am so grateful for all the support. you're all so fun to talk to, i always get so excited when i see a new comment... so don't be acting all surprised when i "yes, and" a bit and flirt back. none of you are safe. 🖤
